items.title: South Korea’s Korbit to rebrand as Digital X under Mirae: Report
items.summary: Mirae Asset reportedly plans to use the South Korean crypto exchange as a hub for tokenized assets, stablecoins and digital finance.

items.title: Ripple launches Mint to expand institutional access to RLUSD
items.summary: Ripple launches Mint to expand RLUSD access for institutions as the stablecoin’s market cap approaches $1.6 billion.

items.title: Bitcoin mining pool Poolin files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy
items.summary: Bitcoin miner Poolin filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy and initiated a $52 million sale of its two West Texas mining sites as part of its future creditor recovery program.

items.title: EU widens Belarus ownership ban to all crypto service providers
items.summary: The EU will bar Belarusian nationals and residents from owning, controlling or managing exchanges and other MiCA-regulated crypto firms from Aug. 25.

items.title: Live updates: Dogecoin and ether lead pullback as investors digest tech earnings
items.summary: Dogecoin dropped 4.5% and ether 2.5%, leading a broad but shallow retreat across the majors, though most remain higher on the week ahead of next week's Fed meeting.

items.title: Bitcoin ETFs snap seven-day inflow streak with $225M in outflows
items.summary: After attracting nearly $1 billion over seven trading sessions, US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded their first daily net outflow since July 13.

items.title: Ripple’s RLUSD gets two boosts as transfer volume drops 25%
items.summary: Ripple launched an institutional minting platform and added RLUSD to Notabene’s compliance network as holder growth rose but monthly transfer volume fell to $10.95 billion.

items.title: Mirae plans to turn crypto exchange Korbit into something Korea hasn't seen before
items.summary: The South Korean financial giant says its Korbit – soon to be rebranded as Digital X – is just the starting point for a broader ecosystem that connects RWAs, stablecoins and digital assets.

items.title: BitMEX hit with 623 BTC lawsuit on day it announces shutdown
items.summary: The proposed class action alleges BitMEX used privileged trading access and server freezes to profit from forced liquidations.

items.title: Bitcoin holds near $65,000 as $800 billion AI selloff leaves crypto largely untouched

items.summary: Nasdaq, Cboe and the London Stock Exchange are among major exchanges moving toward longer trading hours.
